subject: refactor(ui): standardize button styling and fix hardcoded rgba
body:
DaisyUI component classes (btn, card, badge) are unavailable in
Uniwind — only Tailwind utility classes + DaisyUI color tokens work.
The manual bg-primary + rounded + padding pattern is correct for this
Expo/RN Web project, but values were inconsistent across 9 files.

Standardized to consistent system:
- Full-width primary actions: rounded-xl py-3.5 (Save, Update, Validate)
- Compact primary: rounded-xl px-5 py-2.5 (Try Again, Bulk Import)
- Toggle pills: rounded-full py-2.5 px-4 (Paste/Upload, fuel type)
- Outlined/ghost: rounded-xl (Import More)
- Disabled opacity: opacity-60 everywhere (was 50/60/70)

Also fixed DebugPill log row using hardcoded rgba(128,128,128,0.15) —
replaced with border-base-300 className, matching the component's own
convention of className for colors, StyleSheet for non-color properties.

Tags: ui, refactor, consistency, cleanup
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-audit
Semver: patch
